value="<b>FalconStor StorSafe Virtual Tape Library(VTL)</b>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cdeb8b;strokeColor=#36393d;gradientColor=#CCFF99;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1221" y="330" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-15" value="<div style="text-align: center;"><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>PowerHA SystemMirror for IBM i</b></span></div><ul><li>Active/Passive at the production data level, active/active at the OS level</li><li>Covers planned and unplanned outages for both software and hardware with automation</li></ul>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="398" width="252" height="252" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-16" value="<div style=""><div style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--border-color);"><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>Global Replication Service</b></span></div><div style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><ul><li style=""><span style="background-color: initial;">San to San Replication</span></li><li style=""><span style="background-color: initial;">Users need to manually onboard auxiliary (secondary) volumes in the failover Region's PowerVS workspace.</span></li><li style=""><span style="background-color: initial;">Users need to manually start the secondary LPAR at the secondary Region.</span></li></ul></div></div><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="570" y="398" width="252" height="252" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-17" value="<div style="text-align: center;"><b style="font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;; background-color: initial; text-align: left;"><br></b></div><b style="background-color: initial; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;;"><div style="text-align: center;"><b style="background-color: initial;">FalconStor StorSafe VTL</b></div></b><span style="background-color: initial; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;;"><ul style=""><li style=""><b style="font-weight: bold; background-color: initial; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;;">Backup and recovery</b><span style="background-color: initial; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;;"><b>: </b>StorSafe VTL provides disk-based backup and recovery solutions, replacing traditional tape backups. It offers advanced compression and deduplication to reduce storage requirements and improve performance.</span></li><li style=""><p style="background-color: initial; margin: 0px; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;; display: inline !important;" class="p1"><b style="font-weight: bold;">Cloud integration</b><b>: </b>The solution supports hybrid cloud environments, allowing backups to be stored on-premises and replicated to the cloud for disaster recovery and long-term archival.</p></li><li style=""><b style="font-weight: bold; background-color: initial;">Simplified management</b><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>: </b>FalconStor StorSight provides centralized management for multiple StorSafe VTL instances, whether they are on-premises or in the cloud.</span><br></li><li style=""><p style="background-color: initial; margin: 0px; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;; min-height: 15px;" class="p2"><b style="font-weight: bold; background-color: initial;">Ransomware protection</b><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>: </b>StorSafe VTL includes security features to protect data in transit and at rest, helping to safeguard against ransomware attacks.</span><br></p></li></ul></span><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1160" y="398" width="302" height="302" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-18" value="<font style="font-size: 12px;"><b>Use case requirements<br></b></font><p style="" class="MsoNormal"></p><div style="text-align: left;"><ul style=""><li style=""><font style="font-size: 12px;"><span style="background-color: initial;"><font style="font-size: 12px;">Backup IBM i data&nbsp;</font></span><span style="background-color: initial;">utilizing a customer managed backup service.</span></font></li><li style=""><font style="font-size: 12px;"><span style="background-color: initial; color: rgb(29, 28, 29);">Provide OS level local high&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: initial; color: rgb(29, 28, 29);">availability between two IBM i LPARs.</span></font></li><li style=""><font style="font-size: 12px;"><span style="background-color: initial; color: rgb(29, 28, 29); text-indent: -0.5in;">Provide&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: initial; text-indent: -0.5in; color: rgb(29, 28, 29);">a disaster recovery solution utilizing SAN to SAN replication between two&nbsp;</span>regions.</font></li></ul></div><p></p>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="10" width="280" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-19" value="<div style=""><b>SUPPORTS</b></div><div style="text-align: left;"><div><ul><li>Up to 99.99% infrastructure availability when deployed as a multi region.</li><li>Local high availability to protect from immediate lpar failure.</li><li>Backups for IBM i workloads to protect against data loss and support&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">disaster recovery scenarios.</span></li><li>Out-of-region disaster recovery.</li></ul></div></div><p style="" class="MsoNormal"><span style="color: rgb(29, 28, 29);"></span></p><p></p>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="10" width="310" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;endArrow=none;endFill=0;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" source="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-0" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="390" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-0" value="High availlability<br>between two Availability Zone in the same Region" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="250" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=none;endFill=0;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" source="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-1" target="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-0" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-1" value="PowerHA Enhanced Edition with Geomirror" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;gradientColor=#FFB366;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="330" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-4" value="<div style="text-align: center;"><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>PowerHA Enhanced SystemMirror for IBM i</b></span></div><ul><li>Active/Passive at the production data level, active/active at the OS level</li><li>Covers planned and unplanned outages for both software and hardware with automation</li><li>Replicates the data between different volume subsystems with Geomirror.</li></ul>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="398" width="252" height="252" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-7" value="Global Replication Services (GRS) with Disaster Recovery Automation (DRA)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#99CCFF;strokeColor=#36393d;gradientColor=#CCE5FF;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="930" y="338" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-8" value="<div style=""><div style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--border-color);"><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>Global Replication Service</b></span></div><div style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><ul><li style=""><span style="background-color: initial;">San to San Replication</span></li><li><span style="background-color: initial;">Users need to initiate the failover manually</span></li><li><span style="background-color: initial;">Automatic auxiliary volume handling and LPAR start in the Secondary Region.</span></li><li><span style="background-color: initial;">Automation is done by ksys orchestrator AIX LPAR(s)&nbsp;</span></li></ul></div></div><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="398" width="250" height="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-10" value="<b>BRMS backup to ICOS</b>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cdeb8b;strokeColor=#36393d;gradientColor=#CCFF99;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="330" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-11" value="<b>Instance Snapshot for LPAR restore</b>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cdeb8b;strokeColor=#36393d;gradientColor=#CCFF99;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1706" y="330" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-12" value="<b>Image capture and export to ICOS</b>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cdeb8b;strokeColor=#36393d;gradientColor=#CCFF99;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1910" y="330" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-17" value="<div style=""><div style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--border-color);"><b>BRMS backup to ICOS</b></div><div style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><ul><li style="">Autmoated backup to IBM Cloud Objecst Storage bucket from the IBM i system.</li></ul></div></div><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1490" y="398" width="170" height="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-18" value="<div style=""><div style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--border-color);"><b>Instance Snapshot of the LPAR</b></div><div style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><ul><li style="">Manually triggered Instance snapshot that can be used to restore the LPAR with its volumes.</li><li style="">Only the same LPAR can be restored of which the snapshot was taken from</li></ul></div></div><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1670" y="398" width="192" height="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PBDfrTPs9fYRtROfS7U4-19" value="<div style=""><div style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--border-color);"><b>Image Capture and export to ICOS</b></div><div style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><ul><li style="">Manually capture the image of an IBM i LPAR, with all of its data volumes.</li><li style="">The data is saved into COS and can be used to recreate the LPAR when needed.&nbsp;</li><li style="">It can recreate the data of an already existing LPAR or can be used to clone the LPAR.</li></ul></div></div><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1870" y="398" width="210" height="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R9ZaPXhgt76opciJWcew-0" value="<div style=""><div style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--border-color);"><span style="background-color: initial;"><b>Global Replication Service with IBM i Toolkit</b></span></div><div style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><ul><li style=""><span style="background-color: initial;">San to San Replication</span></li><li style="">Toolkit handles the flashcopy of the primary IBM i instance to a "backup" LPAR</li><li style="">The "backup" LPAR flashcopied volumes are replicated to the secondery Region with GRS</li><li style="">Toolkit can bring up the LPAR from the GRS replicated volumes in secondary Region.</li></ul></div></div><div style="text-align: center;"></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;align=left;" vertex="1" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1"> <mxGeometry x="714" y="720" width="252" height="252" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R9ZaPXhgt76opciJWcew-3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;endArrow=none;endFill=0;" edge="1" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="790" y="295" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="840" y="660" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R9ZaPXhgt76opciJWcew-2" value="Global Replication Services (GRS) with Disaster Recovery Automation (DRA)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#99CCFF;strokeColor=#36393d;gradientColor=#CCE5FF;" vertex="1" parent="GQisBNuAgy4jhViUgw5_-1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="660" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 140px; margin-left: 351px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: PowerVS IBM i workloads on IBM Cloud

switch.text: PowerVS IBM i workloads on IBM Cloud

div.style: text-align: center;

b.style: font-weight: bold; background-color: initial; font-family: "Helvetica Neue";

li.span: : StorSafe VTL provides disk-based backup and recovery solutions, replacing traditional tape backups. It offers advanced compression and deduplication to reduce storage requirements and improve performance.

p.style: background-color: initial; margin: 0px; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal; font-family: "Helvetica Neue"; display: inline !important;

li.p: Cloud integration: The solution supports hybrid cloud environments, allowing backups to be stored on-premises and replicated to the cloud for disaster recovery and long-term archival.

li.span: : FalconStor StorSight provides centralized management for multiple StorSafe VTL instances, whether they are on-premises or in the cloud.

p.style: background-color: initial; margin: 0px; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal; font-family: "Helvetica Neue"; min-height: 15px;
p.span: : StorSafe VTL includes security features to protect data in transit and at rest, helping to safeguard against ransomware attacks.

div.style: text-align: center;

switch.text: FalconStor StorSafe VTLBackup and recovery: StorSa...

div.style: border-color: var(--border-color);

ul.li: Manually capture the image of an IBM i LPAR, with all of its data volumes.
The data is saved into COS and can be used to recreate the LPAR when needed.
It can recreate the data of an already existing LPAR or can be used to clone the LPAR.

Toolkit can bring up the LPAR from the GRS replicated volumes in secondary Region.
